FLOW.COMMENT: insertActive - insert a new record into the TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE and TFW_TRANS_STEPS tables

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: fwTransactionRevive - revive a transaction by bringing it out of TFW_TRANS_HISTORY and back into TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE, and setting it to STEP00

MAP.COMMENT: INSERT INTO TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE SELECT * FROM TFW_TRANS_HISTORY WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

Values.value: INSERT INTO TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE SELECT * FROM TFW_TRANS_HISTORY WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

INVOKE.NAME: sRows != 1
INVOKE.COMMENT: Delete from TFW_TRANS_HISTORY failed with %sRows% rows deleted

Values.value: Delete from TFW_TRANS_HISTORY failed with %sRows% rows deleted

INVOKE.COMMENT: Insert to TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE failed with %sRows% rows inserted

Values.value: Insert to TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE failed with %sRows% rows inserted

MAP.COMMENT: UPDATE TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE SET CURRENT_WORKFLOW_STEP='STEP00' WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

Values.value: UPDATE TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE SET CURRENT_WORKFLOW_STEP='STEP00' WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

INVOKE.COMMENT: Transaction %sFwTransactionid% successfully revived back to the active table and set to STEP00

Values.value: Transaction %sFwTransactionid% successfully revived back to the active table and set to STEP00

INVOKE.COMMENT: Failed to revive transaction %sFwTransactionid%, error is %sErrmsg%

Values.value: Failed to revive transaction %sFwTransactionid%, error is %sErrmsg%
